mnemonics.title: Gradient
mnemonics.content: G - Greatest, R - Rate, A - Always, D - Direction, I - Increase, E - Every, N - New, T - Time

mnemonics.title: Directional Derivative
mnemonics.content: D - Direction, I - In, R - Rate, E - Every, C - Change, T - Time, I - Increase, O - Of, N - New, A - Amount, L - Location

acronyms.expansion: Greatest Rate Always Direction Increase Every New Time
acronyms.usage: To remember the concept of gradient

acronyms.expansion: Direction In Rate Every Change Time Increase Of New Amount Location
acronyms.usage: To remember the concept of directional derivative

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a ball rolling down a hill, the direction of the ball is the direction of the gradient
Imagine a car moving in a specific direction, the rate of change of the car's position is the directional derivative

analogies.analogy: A gradient is like a compass that points in the direction of the greatest rate of increase
A directional derivative is like a speedometer that measures the rate of change of an object's position in a specific direction
